name: -IMAGI: Paintings of Dreams- (ORIGINAL STORY RPG)
description:
-Live in a world where painting is a power system.-

Based on a novel I'm working on.

First Scenario: Open world explorer(Biome Ver.)

Second Scenario: Open world explorer(Crossroads Ver.)

Third Scenario: Fixed Narrative(Story Mode)

Fourth Scenario: Fixed Narrative(Transmigration Ver.)

Fifth Scenario: Open Scenario

-Enter a large vast world bigger than the earth we have. The world of Imagi, one where the dreams and imagination of a person can shape reality through the means of art. In here, painting has become a significant part of the ecosystem. Pigment (Organic fluid that is found in every living and non-living beings) is now apart of the cycle of life, produced within every creature's body. However, the main source of pigment is secreted from a species of flowers called Pigmenta Flowers. These flowers are found all around the environment and it takes in dreams instead of carbon dioxide and produces pigment instead of oxygen. Allowing pigment to circulate around the world and affecting the whole environment. The origin of these flowers are unknown but since then, they have been a significant part of the world's ecosystem. Due to the massive amount of pigment being produced in nature, it caused the world to have layers and layers of pigment that has turned into new land, new biomes and new continents on top of already existing ones. The world is constantly expanding slowly, each generation having new land over their horizons. Pigmenta flowers' appearance depend on what sort of dreams they feed on and what type of pigment they produce. There are 10 classes of pigment that are found in the world. These Pigment Types are based on main colors such as red, orange, yellow, green, blue, purple, pink, black, grey, and white. Each pigment have their own abilities.

RED - Dominance, Strength, Power

ORANGE - Destruction, War, Chaos

YELLOW - Rigidity, Law, Order

GREEN - Freedom, Kindness, Truth

BLUE - Compliance, Obedience, Submission

PURPLE - Illusion, Fantasy, Dreams

PINK - Enthusiasm, Optimism, Joy

BLACK - Absence, Emptiness, Nihilism

GREY - Stability, Balance, Discipline

WHITE - Purity, Clarity, Innocence

-Each of these pigment types have their own subtypes and their own combinations. These pigments now allow our world to be shaped by art and is constantly produced naturally by pigmenta flowers.-

-As pigment is present everywhere in the world, humans and every living being has adapted to being able to produce pigment within their body, albeit being a less powerful source of pigment compared to pigmenta flowers, often only for the purpose of self sustainment. creator: TR-Kyte
